name: Zuni Indian Bread
recipeIngredient: 7/8 cup Water if dry buttermilk used
1/4 tsp Baking soda (omit if using powdered buttermilk)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to a light setting.
2. Mix all dry ingredients in a large bowl.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together wet ingredients and stir into the dry mixture.
4. Add sunflower seeds and baking soda (if using), then mix well.
5. Dissolve yeast in warm water if using, and add to the mixture.
6. Stir until combined and let dough rest for 15 minutes.
7. Shape the dough on a floured surface and place it in a greased bowl.
8. Cover and let rise until doubled.
9. Bake at the light setting until golden brown and crispy.
